metadata.significance: Describes the ascension to Allah and human characteristics

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَأَلَ سَآئِلٌۢ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ

translations.en_sahih: A supplicant asked for a punishment bound to happen
translations.en_yusufali: A questioner asked about a Penalty to befall-
translations.ms_basmeih: Salah seorang (dari kalangan orang-orang kafir Makkah, secara mengejek-ejek) meminta kedatangan azab yang (dijanjikan) akan berlaku,

translations.en_sahih: To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer.
translations.en_yusufali: The Unbelievers, the which there is none to ward off,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Azab yang disediakan untuk orang-orang yang kafir, yang tidak ada sesiapapun dapat menolak kedatangannya -

translations.en_sahih: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent.
translations.en_yusufali: (A Penalty) from Allah, Lord of the Ways of Ascent.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dari Allah yang menguasai tempat-tempat turun naik -

ayahs.arabic: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
ayahs.transliteration: TaAAruju almalaikatu waalrroohu ilayhi fee yawmin kana miqdaruhu khamseena alfa sanatin

translations.en_sahih: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.
translations.en_yusufali: The angels and the spirit ascend unto him in a Day the measure whereof is (as) fifty thousand years:
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang dilalui oleh malaikat-malaikat dan Jibril ke pusat pemerintahanNya (untuk menerima dan menyempurnakan tugas masing-masing, terutama) pada satu masa yang adalah tempohnya (dirasai oleh orang-orang yang bersalah) sungguh panjang, (kerana banyak hitungan hisab dan berat soal jawabnya).

translations.en_sahih: So be patient with gracious patience.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore do thou hold Patience,- a Patience of beautiful (contentment).
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka bersabarlah (wahai Muhammad terhadap ejekan golongan yang kafir itu), dengan cara kesabaran yang sebaik-baiknya.

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, they see it [as] distant,
translations.en_yusufali: They see the (Day) indeed as a far-off (event):
translations.ms_basmeih: Sebenarnya mereka memandang azab itu jauh (daripada berlaku),

translations.en_sahih: But We see it [as] near.
translations.en_yusufali: But We see it (quite) near.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sedang Kami memandangnya dekat, (tetap akan berlaku),

translations.en_sahih: On the Day the sky will be like murky oil,
translations.en_yusufali: The Day that the sky will be like molten brass,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) pada hari langit menjadi seperti tembaga cair,

translations.en_sahih: And the mountains will be like wool,
translations.en_yusufali: And the mountains will be like wool,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan gunung-ganang pula menjadi seperti bulu (yang berterbangan)

translations.en_sahih: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,
translations.en_yusufali: And no friend will ask after a friend,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sahabat karib tidak bertanyakan hal sahabat karibnya, (kerana tiap-tiap seorang sibuk memikirkan hal keadaannya sendiri),

ayahs.arabic: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yubassaroonahum yawaddu almujrimu law yaftadee min AAathabi yawmiithin bibaneehi

translations.en_sahih: They will be shown each other. The criminal will wish that he could be ransomed from the punishment of that Day by his children
translations.en_yusufali: Though they will be put in sight of each other,- the sinner's desire will be: Would that he could redeem himself from the Penalty of that Day by (sacrificing) his children,
translations.ms_basmeih: Padahal masing-masing diberi melihat setengahnya yang lain; (pada saat yang demikian) orang yang kafir suka kiranya dapat menebus dirinya dari azab itu dengan anak-anaknya sendiri,

translations.en_sahih: And his wife and his brother
translations.en_yusufali: His wife and his brother,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan isteri serta saudaranya,

translations.en_sahih: And his nearest kindred who shelter him
translations.en_yusufali: His kindred who sheltered him,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kaum kerabatnya yang melindunginya,

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waman fee alardi jameeAAan thumma yunjeehi

translations.en_sahih: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.
translations.en_yusufali: And all, all that is on earth,- so it could deliver him:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga sekalian makhluk yang ada di bumi - kemudian (diharapkannya) tebusan itu dapat menyelamatkannya.

translations.en_sahih: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],
translations.en_yusufali: By no means! for it would be the Fire of Hell!-
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak sekali-kali (sebagaimana yang diharapkannya)! Sesungguhnya neraka (yang disediakan baginya) tetap menjulang-julang apinya,

translations.en_sahih: A remover of exteriors.
translations.en_yusufali: Plucking out (his being) right to the skull!-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Membakar serta) menggugurkan kulit ubun-ubun dan anggota anggota tubuh badan,

translations.en_sahih: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
translations.en_yusufali: Inviting (all) such as turn their backs and turn away their faces (from the Right).
translations.ms_basmeih: Neraka itu juga memanggil dan menarik orang yang membelakangi serta berpaling (dari kebenaran),

translations.en_sahih: And collected [wealth] and hoarded.
translations.en_yusufali: And collect (wealth) and hide it (from use)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan yang mengumpulkan harta kekayaan lalu menyimpannya (dengan tidak membayar zakatnya).

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, mankind was created anxious:
translations.en_yusufali: Truly man was created very impatient;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya manusia itu dijadikan bertabiat resah gelisah (lagi bakhil kedekut); -

translations.en_sahih: When evil touches him, impatient,
translations.en_yusufali: Fretful when evil touches him;
translations.ms_basmeih: Apabila ia ditimpa kesusahan, dia sangat resah gelisah;

translations.en_sahih: And when good touches him, withholding [of it],
translations.en_yusufali: And niggardly when good reaches him;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apabila ia beroleh kesenangan, ia sangat bakhil kedekut;

translations.en_sahih: Except the observers of prayer -
translations.en_yusufali: Not so those devoted to Prayer;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali orang-orang yang mengerjakan sembahyang -

translations.en_sahih: Those who are constant in their prayer
translations.en_yusufali: Those who remain steadfast to their prayer;
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu mereka yang tetap mengerjakan sembahyangnya;

translations.en_sahih: And those within whose wealth is a known right
translations.en_yusufali: And those in whose wealth is a recognised right.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka (yang menentukan bahagian) pada harta-hartanya, menjadi hak yang termaklum -

translations.en_sahih: For the petitioner and the deprived -
translations.en_yusufali: For the (needy) who asks and him who is prevented (for some reason from asking);
translations.ms_basmeih: Bagi orang miskin yang meminta dan orang miskin yang menahan diri (daripada meminta);

translations.en_sahih: And those who believe in the Day of Recompense
translations.en_yusufali: And those who hold to the truth of the Day of Judgment;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang percayakan hari pembalasan (dengan mengerjakan amal-amal yang soleh sebagai buktinya);

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waallatheena hum min AAathabi rabbihim mushfiqoona

translations.en_sahih: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord -
translations.en_yusufali: And those who fear the displeasure of their Lord,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang cemas takut daripada ditimpa azab Tuhannya, -

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe -
translations.en_yusufali: For their Lord's displeasure is the opposite of Peace and Tranquillity;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana sesungguhnya azab Tuhan mereka, tidak patut (bagi seseorangpun) merasa aman terhadapnya;

translations.en_sahih: And those who guard their private parts
translations.en_yusufali: And those who guard their chastity,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang menjaga kehormatannya, -

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena

translations.en_sahih: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed -
translations.en_yusufali: Except with their wives and the (captives) whom their right hands possess,- for (then) they are not to be blamed,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali kepada isterinya atau kepada hambanya, maka sesungguhnya mereka tidak tercela;

ayahs.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -
translations.en_yusufali: But those who trespass beyond this are transgressors;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian sesiapa yang mengingini selain dari yang demikian, maka merekalah orang-orang yang melampaui batas;

translations.en_sahih: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
translations.en_yusufali: And those who respect their trusts and covenants;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang menjaga amanah dan janjinya;

translations.en_sahih: And those who are in their testimonies upright
translations.en_yusufali: And those who stand firm in their testimonies;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang memberikan keterangan dengan benar lagi adil (semasa mereka menjadi saksi);

translations.en_sahih: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:
translations.en_yusufali: And those who guard (the sacredness) of their worship;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan mereka yang tetap memelihara sembahyangnya;

translations.en_sahih: They will be in gardens, honored.
translations.en_yusufali: Such will be the honoured ones in the Gardens (of Bliss).
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (yang demikian sifatnya) ditempatkan di dalam Syurga dengan diberikan penghormatan.

translations.en_sahih: So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muhammad],
translations.en_yusufali: Now what is the matter with the Unbelievers that they rush madly before thee-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apakah yang menyebabkan orang-orang kafir, yang menentangmu (wahai Muhammad) datang berkejaran ke sisimu -

translations.en_sahih: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?
translations.en_yusufali: From the right and from the left, in crowds?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sambil mereka) berkumpul berpuak-puak di sebelah kanan dan di sebelah kirimu.

ayahs.arabic: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: AyatmaAAu kullu imriin minhum an yudkhala jannata naAAeemin

translations.en_sahih: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?
translations.en_yusufali: Does every man of them long to enter the Garden of Bliss?
translations.ms_basmeih: Patutkah tiap-tiap seorang dari mereka berharap supaya dimasukkan ke dalam Syurga yang penuh nikmat (sedang ia tidak beriman)?

translations.en_sahih: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.
translations.en_yusufali: By no means! For We have created them out of the (base matter) they know!
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidak sekali-kali! (Mereka yang kufur ingkar tidak akan dapat memasukinya). Sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan mereka dari apa yang mereka sedia mengetahuinya.

ayahs.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fala oqsimu birabbi almashariqi waalmagharibi inna laqadiroona

translations.en_sahih: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
translations.en_yusufali: Now I do call to witness the Lord of all points in the East and the West that We can certainly-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Aku bersumpah dengan (kebesaranKu) Tuhan yang menguasai (seluruh alam, meliputi) tempat-tempat terbit (matahari dan bulan bintang) dan tempat-tempat tenggelamnya, - sesungguhnya Kami berkuasa -

ayahs.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: AAala an nubaddila khayran minhum wama nahnu bimasbooqeena

translations.en_sahih: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.
translations.en_yusufali: Substitute for them better (men) than they; And We are not to be defeated (in Our Plan).
translations.ms_basmeih: (Membinasakan mereka, serta) menggantikan mereka dengan makhluk-makluk yang lebih baik dari mereka; dan Kami tidak sekali-kali dapat dikalahkan atau dilemahkan.

ayahs.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -
translations.en_yusufali: So leave them to plunge in vain talk and play about, until they encounter that Day of theirs which they have been promised!-
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, biarkanlah mereka (wahai Muhammad) tenggelam dalam kesesatannya dan leka bermain-main (dalam dunianya), sehingga mereka menemui hari yang dijanjikan kepada mereka (untuk menerima balasan)! -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma yakhrujoona mina alajdathi siraAAan kaannahum ila nusubin yoofidoona

translations.en_sahih: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.
translations.en_yusufali: The Day whereon they will issue from their sepulchres in sudden haste as if they were rushing to a goal-post (fixed for them),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu hari mereka segera keluar dari kubur masing-masing menuju (ke Padang Mahsyar) dengan keadaan seolah-olah mereka berkejaran ke (tempat) berhala-berhala (yang mereka sembah dahulu),

ayahs.arabic: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun thalika alyawmu allathee kanoo yooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
translations.en_yusufali: Their eyes lowered in dejection,- ignominy covering them (all over)! such is the Day the which they are promised!
translations.ms_basmeih: Sambil pandangan mereka tunduk, serta mereka diliputi kehinaan; itulah hari yang telah dijanjikan kepada mereka.
